caption: The video features a professional setting where a man, dressed in a suit and tie, is speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The scene transitions to a promotional graphic for "theCUBE.net," displayed against a dark blue background with various digital elements and data visualizations, suggesting a focus on technology and innovation. The overall tone of the video is formal and informative, likely aimed at professionals interested in database technologies and industry insights.
